reference_page.layout_type: AdminPage with table and modal form
patterns_noted: TABLE_CONFIG array with TableColumn<T>[] defining columns with Header and Cell properties
FORM_CONFIG array with FormFieldConfig<T>[] defining form fields with key, label, widget, and validate
FILTER_CONFIG object with filter definitions for search, select dropdowns, and radio buttons
formAutocomplete widget for entity references (company, currency)
Label component with variant (success/danger) for status display
Custom Cell renderer using props.row.original and props.value
toSubmitBody function to transform form data before submission
DEFAULT_FILTER object with initial filter values
DEFAULT_SORT array for initial table sorting

similar_patterns.description: VendorBank page with nearly identical structure, already includes correspondent account fields (corrAccountNumber, corrBankName, corrBankSwift) — primary reference for adding correspondent account to CompanyBank form
BudgetLineCategory page uses FilterRadioButtons for multi-option filtering and BooleanTableCell for status display — reference for multi-state status filter

image_observations: Image 1 (LIST PAGE): Header reads 'Company Bank Accounts'. Columns: Short Code, Account Name, Bank Name, Currency, IBAN, Company, Status, Actions. Status uses Label component (green=Active, red=Inactive). Company column shows company name with ID in parentheses. Filters: search box, Bank Name dropdown, Company ID dropdown, Account Currency dropdown, Status radio buttons (All/Active/Inactive). Pagination shows 20 of 525 records. Actions per row: edit (pencil) and delete icons. Account Number column is absent and must be added.

Image 2 (FORM PAGE): Modal form layout. Fields visible: Short Code, Account Name, Bank Name, Company (autocomplete), Account Currency (autocomplete), Address (textarea), SWIFT, Account Number. Single-column layout within modal. Save/Close buttons at bottom. Active flag shown as checkbox. Correspondent account field is absent and must be added. Field order needs resequencing per requirements.
